caption: The video shows a white slide containing a numbered list of goals or topics. The text on the slide is identical across all frames. The first point is "1. Characterize (unconscious) bias," which is followed by three indented sub-points: "- cognitive empathy (Arabs and Israelis; Democrats and Republicans)," "- affective empathy (Arabs and Israelis)," and "- dehumanization (Americans re: Muslims, 'Gypsies', homeless)." The second point listed is "2. Neural Focus Groups," and the third point is "3. Neuro-diagnostics." There are no people, objects, or logos visible in the scene. The only movement throughout the clip is the subtle shift of a white mouse cursor, which moves across the top of the screen and then appears again in the center area. The background of the slide remains static, and the text does not change.
